hero.title: Buy, Renovate, Furnish and Finance Your Home in One Place
hero.subtitle: The premium PropTech ecosystem connecting you with exclusive properties and vetted professionals.
hero.labelWhatRenovate: What do you want to renovate?

featuredProperties.title: Exclusive Properties
featuredProperties.desc: Discover our hand-picked selection of premium homes ready for their next chapter.

costCalculator.title: Calculate Your Total Investment
costCalculator.desc: Understand the full picture. Our unified calculator combines your mortgage, renovation, and furnishing costs into one clear monthly payment.
costCalculator.step1Desc: Start with the listing price of your dream home.
costCalculator.step2Desc: Add expected costs for structural or cosmetic updates.
costCalculator.step3Desc: Include professional design and premium furniture packages.
costCalculator.resultNote: *Includes estimated property tax and insurance. Assumes 5% interest rate over 30 years.

transformationSlider.title: Visualize the Possibilities
transformationSlider.desc: See how different interior design styles can completely transform a space. Use the slider to compare before and after.

featuredVendors.title: Vetted Professionals
featuredVendors.desc: Connect with top-rated contractors, visionary architects, and talented interior designers to bring your dream home to life.

howItWorks.title: The One Home Journey
howItWorks.desc: A seamless, end-to-end experience for your entire property journey.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our curated selection of premium listings, from move-in ready homes to properties with potential.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get pre-approved for a unified mortgage that covers both your property purchase and renovation costs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Open a tender, receive bids, and select the perfect contractor and architect from our vetted network.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Choose curated furniture packages from interior designers that perfectly match your new space.

inspiration.title: Design Inspiration
inspiration.desc: Explore curated design styles from top architects and interior designers in our network.

footer.description: The premium PropTech ecosystem. Buy, renovate, furnish, and finance your home in one place.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest luxury property listings and design inspiration.
